rationale: The plan successfully incorporates all specification amendments up to v2.8 (including the rigorous D33 module-load closure bounds, D26/D29 driver-owned completeness counting, D30/D32 module loader prohibitions, D31 independent contract file reading, and D20/D28 atomic publication rules). It guarantees that Clotho is zero-dependency, spine read-only, purely advisory, and aggressively fail-closed. The step-by-step breakdown across Tasks 0-7 is implementation-ready and perfectly respects the repository's strict trust model.
